extra.reasoning: The property NOT(rec_drug_a AND rec_drug_b) is VIOLATED. rec_drug_a is set true only by rule rec_a_from_conjunction (priority 50), whose antecedent is the conjunction of all 10 conditions, which includes renal_impairment. rec_drug_b is set true by rule rec_b_from_trigger (priority 50) whenever renal_impairment is true. Since the conjunction that triggers rec_drug_a necessarily requires renal_impairment=true, the very same input also triggers rec_drug_b. Priority/conflict resolution operates per-output (it only breaks ties among rules targeting the SAME output); rec_drug_a and rec_drug_b are distinct outputs, each with a single matching rule, so both rules fire independently and both outputs are set true. Setting all 10 conjunction inputs to true (renal_impairment, seizure_history, anticoagulated, hypertension, elderly, ckd_dialysis, hepatic_impairment, heart_failure, peptic_ulcer, prior_gi_bleed) yields rec_drug_a=true and rec_drug_b=true simultaneously. asthma is irrelevant to outputs a and b (it only affects rec_drug_c); set false. This jointly true state violates mutual exclusion.
